text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As enthusiasm continues to build in the lead-up
to the Japanese Derby, Symboli Rudolf
approaches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"If you wish to repay your trainer for their trust,
then there is no other place more suitable than
the Japanese Derby."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These words appear to send Special Week into
deep thought.
